units.description: Sortedness: the output list is sorted in nondecreasing order. (Variant 7 stresses cross-family confusion: obligations must reference this instance's types and entry point only.)

Permutation: the output is a permutation of the input (every element preserved, counts preserved). (Variant 7 stresses cross-family confusion: obligations must reference this instance's types and entry point only.)
common_failure_modes: asserting set equality without counting duplicates

units.description: Termination on every input. (Variant 7 stresses cross-family confusion: obligations must reference this instance's types and entry point only.)
Stability is NOT required and should not be asserted. (Variant 7 stresses cross-family confusion: obligations must reference this instance's types and entry point only.)
